titleEn: TAMU AgriLife receives federal funding for New World screwworm research
contentHtml:
COLLEGE STATION, Texas — Texas A&M University’s AgriLife will receive part of $105 million in research funding announced by the USDA to bolster the nation’s defenses against New World screwworm […]
The post TAMU AgriLife receives federal funding for New World screwworm research first appeared on poultrytimes.com.
